title: Mirror the sum of a column in another board
excerpt:
hey everyone ! 
I have one board “budget” - each column in it represent a month of the year . 
at the bottom the total sum of the whole month is shown.

posts.author: Lea1 (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey everyone !
I have one board “budget” - each column in it represent a month of the year .
at the bottom the total sum of the whole month is shown.
i want to mirror this total in another board - since it is not a row i can not find how to do that.
would love if someone has a solution ?

posts.author: ioi_jason (Jason Sami [IOI/BPX])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Lea,

If you mirror all the rows from the ‘Budget’ board into that other board under the one row, you should see it as a sum.

Kind Regards,
Jason

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
